expectations.text: No false flag on unexported helpers

expectations.evidence: UserRepository correctly NOT flagged — agent found cross-package reference in adapter (postgres_repo.go:12). Notifier/RegisterService/NewRegisterService correctly flagged as genuinely unused (no implementation or caller outside usecase).
Report [Important]: 'ID generation is deterministic and causes duplicate user IDs... generateID() always returns usr_placeholder.'
Covers nil notifier panic, email validation weakness, missing test coverage.
